session.user:
Run these two commands and report results. Do NOT fix anything, just report:
``` cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run ruff check src/ tests/ 2>&1 | tail -5 ```
``` cd /home/runner/work/erk/erk && uv run ty check src/ 2>&1 | tail -5 ```
Report whether each passed or list any failures.
session.assistant: I'll run both commands and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/ tests/ 2>&1 | tail -5
Check ruff linting for src and tests directories

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ty check src/ 2>&1 | tail -5
Check type checking with ty for src directory

session.assistant:
**Results:**
- **ruff check**: Passed - All checks passed! - **ty check**: Passed - All checks passed!
Both linting and type checking are passing successfully.
